page_content:
Prerequisite: STAT410.

STAT601 Probability Theory II (3 Credits)

Weak convergence of measures; characteristic functions; Central Limit Theorem and local limit theorem; stable laws; Kolmogorov consistency theorem (without proof); conditional expectations and martingales; optimal stopping theorem; convergence of martingales; Brownian motion; Markov processes and families; stochastic integral and Ito formula. Prerequisite: STAT600.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
